"[48] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from 1180-Trfc Collision-Major Inj to 1144-Fatality by CHP [Shared]"
"[43] A59-015 CASTRO HAS VEH - ALL LANES ARE OPEN [Shared]"
"[39] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from 1179-Trfc Collision-1141 Enrt to 1180-Trfc Collision-Major Inj by CHP [Shared]"
"[38] SVS VERIFIED "
"[37] VEH ENTERED INTO CERT "
"[16] [Rotation Request Comment] 1039 CASTRO 661-641-4264 -ETA DRIVE TIME CALCITY [Shared]"
"[14] A59-015 SHUTTING #2 LANE [Shared]"
"[13] 59-2 97 JSO REDROCKRANDSBURG RD [Shared]"
"[24] [Appended, 08:17:20] [1] VEH ON SB SIDE "
"[6] DEBRIS IN LANES "
"[5] PARTIALLY 1125 "
"[11] [Appended, 07:38:20] [3] PTY TRAPPED IN VEH "
"[46] 72-19 ADVS VIA LL @09:26 HRS BIG VALLEY WAS 97 AND ENVIROMENTAL SERVICE WAS 97 AT 09:00 HRS "
"[45] 1039 PSDS BARLOW VIA TEXT"
"[39] 72-19 REQ OES # // ADVSD 50 - 200 GALONS HAVE LEAKED WITH POSS SOME OIL // AREA AFFECTED IS ABOUT A 20FT BY 8FT WIDE SECTION IN THE DRIT WITH NO WATERWAYS AFFECTED // NEG TRAFFIC HAZARD"
"[37] 1039 INVLVD'S COMPANY 224-955-2888 UPDATE ON INVLVD, TEN WEST INFORMATION AND CONTACT INFO FOR 72-19 // COMPANY WILL RECALL TO ADVS WHEN THEY HAVE ARRANGED TOW AND CLEANUP"
"[27] MEDICAL 1097"
"[26] PROVIDED INVLVD'S COMPANY WITH TWO STAR TOW PHONE NUMBER"
"[23] 72-19 COPIES ALL ENRT WITH APPROX 30 MINUTE ETA"
"[22] INVLD ADV APROX 100 FTT OFF RDWY "
"[21] INVLVD'S COMPANY COPIES ALL // WILL WORK ON ARRANGING 1185 THROUGH THEIR SAFETY DEPT"
"[14] OCUPANT OUTSIDE OF VEH "
"[12] INVLD ADV LOST CONTROL AND TC'D NEG 1125 - VEH DID ROLL OVER "
"[9] 72-19 COPIES // REQ TO CONTINUE FIRE ANYWAY AND NOTIFY CT"
"[2] SINGLE VEH - SEMI TRUCK ACCIDENT "
"[1] 1141 STARTED FOR INJ TO HAND "

Log.Location: "Oak Creek Rd / Tehachapi Willow Springs Rd"

details.IncidentDetail: "[1] OAK CREEK RD CLOSED FROM TEHACHAPI WILLOW SPRINGS RD TO CEMENT PLANT RD DUE TO SNOW AND ICE"

"[1] TEHACHAPI WILLOW SPRINGS RD CLOSED FROM HIGHLINE RD TO BACKUS RD DUE TO SNOW AND ICE"
"[1] ROAD DEAD ENDS AT THE NORTH END OF LAKE ST AND OLD US HWY 395"
"[11] SR89 (MONITOR PASS) - WINTER CLOSURE"
"[9] SR270 (BODIE RD) - WINTER CLOSURE"
"[8] SR120W (TIOGA PASS) - WINTER CLOSURE"

"[3] SR168 (ASPENDELL) - WINTER CLOSURE"
